prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约为3358名、3417名、5191名、3126名、2752名。2023年出现异常大幅后移（5191名），近两年显著回升，2025年达 到近年最优位次2752名，较2024年前移约374名，整体呈波动中前移趋势；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划：2021年37人、2022年36人、2023年36人、2024年37 人、2025年32人，2026年计划31人，较2025年减少1人，小幅缩招，理论上使竞争略有加剧、位次略前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 重庆大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建 设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第34名，近年排名稳定在第33–34名区间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要因实验室 爆炸事件引发关注；抖音热度排名第23位（较热），短视频平台曝光量处于中上水平；历史投档异常记录中未见重大断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，土木工程获 评A+，机械工程、环境科学与工程、电气工程、风景园林学获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，与该校在黑龙江招生的工科试验班（卓越计划、电气信息类、计算机与 智能软件等）高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与重庆大学优势工科方向吻合，有利于吸引高 分考生；黑龙江省2026年高考总人数约16.7万人（较2025年总人数17.2万略有下降），物理类考生估算约11.4万人（较2025年11.7万减少约3%），考生规模小幅缩减使竞争略有缓 解；重庆大学位于重庆市，距黑龙江较远，属于跨省就读，地域偏好上部分考生可能倾向留东北或去京津，但重大作为98 5综合类高校的全国性吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2752名、2026年小幅缩招、声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热度、考生总数略降缓解竞 争等因素。预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约2720名，区间2312–3128名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 3358, 3417, 5191, 3126, and 2752 respectively. In 2023, there was an abnormal significant backward shift (5191), but it has notably rebounded in the past two years, reaching the best ranking in recent years at 2752 in 2025, moving forward by about 374 places compared to 2024, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province: 37 in 2021, 36 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 37 in 2024, 32 in 2025, and 31 planned for 2026, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, theoretically intensifying competition slightly and moving rankings forward a bit.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 34th, with a stable ranking in the 33rd–34th range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to attention from a laboratory explosion incident. Its Douyin popularity ranks 23rd (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level. No major discontinuation signals have been seen in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Civil Engineering was rated A+, Mechanical Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Landscape Architecture were rated A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities, which highly match the Engineering Experimental Classes (Excellence Plan, Electrical Information, Computer and Intelligent Software, etc.) that the university recruits in Heilongjiang.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended with sustained social popularity, aligning well with Chongqing University's advantageous engineering fields, helping attract high-scoring students. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang college entrance examination is approximately 167,000 (slightly down from 172,000 in 2025), with an estimated 114,000 Physics Category candidates (a decrease of about 3% from 117,000 in 2025), a slight reduction in candidate scale easing competition somewhat. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, far from Heilongjiang, making it an inter-provincial study option. Some candidates may prefer to stay in the Northeast or go to Beijing-Tianjin, but as a 985 comprehensive university, Chongqing University has strong national appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2752, a slight enrollment reduction in 2026, a slightly negative reputation that may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, and a slight decrease in total candidates easing competition, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 2720, with a range of 2312–3128.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials) (including Energy and Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Connected Vehicle Innovation Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 2720 is at the median level in recent years. It is recommended that candidates with rankings between 2312 and 2720 focus on Tier 2 as the main choice and aim for Tier 1 as a stretch. Candidates with rankings between 2720 and 3128 should focus on Tier 3 as the main choice and aim for Tier 2 as a stretch. Candidates with rankings significantly better than 2312 can focus on aiming for Tier 1's flagship majors (Excellence Plan, Electrical Engineering).

The enrollment plan for History Category in Heilongjiang: 5 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 4 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 6 in 2026, an increase of 2 compared to 2025, a 50% expansion, theoretically intensifying competition and significantly shifting rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranking 34th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion incident. It ranks 23rd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot). No major gap signals are seen in historical admission anomalies. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chongqing University's A- and above disciplines are all engineering (Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Environmental Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-), with no A-level disciplines in liberal arts, indicating relatively weak overall disciplinary support for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social popularity of divided observation, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Foreign Language and Literature is generally observed, and liberal arts majors overall are relatively cold. In 2026, the total number of Heilongjiang college entrance exam takers is about 167,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 53,000 (a decrease of about 3% from 55,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, far from Heilongjiang, requiring cross-province study. The university enrolls very few History Category students in Heilongjiang (4–6), leading to significant ranking fluctuations due to small enrollment size.

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 665, a significant 50% expansion in 2026, the relatively cold popularity of liberal arts majors potentially suppressing application enthusiasm, and a slight decrease in total candidates easing competition, the predicted minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 850, with a range of 600–1100.
